mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_permit_registry WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN expiry_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, expiry_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_registry WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_registry WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_registry WHERE deleted = 0 AND category = #{category}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_registry WHERE deleted = 0 AND expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND expiry_date < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_registry WHERE deleted = 0 AND expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND expiry_date >= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND expiry_date <= DATEADD(day, #{days}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_registry WHERE deleted = 0 AND (expiry_date IS NULL OR expiry_date > DATEADD(day, 90, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_permit_registry ( category, permit_type, name, law, agency, permit_number, issued_date, expiry_date, cycle, facility, location, manager, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{category}, #{permitType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{name}, #{law,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{agency,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{permitNumber,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{issuedDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{expiryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{cycle,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{facility,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{location,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{manager,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_permit_registry SET category = #{category}, permit_type = #{permitType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, name = #{name}, law = #{law,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, agency = #{agency,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, permit_number = #{permitNumber,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, issued_date = #{issuedDate,jdbcType=DATE}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, cycle = #{cycle,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, facility = #{facility,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, location = #{location,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, manager = #{manager,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_permit_registry SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
